title: Yizhet 5Pcs Valve Adapter Set Dunlop Presta Schrader Valve Adapter Bicycle Air Pump Inflation Needle Nozzle Kit Car Valve/Flash Valve/Slave Valve for Bicycle/Floor Pump/SV/AV/DV/Air Mattress Ball Pump
features: ★Super Bike Valve Adapter set: The bike pump adaptor is your best choice, the 5pcs various specifications can meet different inflatable equipment, to convert UK Dunlop Valve (DV), French Presta Valve (SV) to American Schrader Valve(AV), or Presta Valve to Schrader Valve(AV).

★Made of copper: All of these bicycle pump valve accessories are made of copper with screw threads, which is extremely durable and corrosion resistant. Thanks to the high-quality workmanship, the set will be a long-term companion.

★With standard size: the valve adapter fits most bike pumps, such as mountain bikes, road bikes, racing cycle with Presta, Schrader or Dunlop Valve, and the ball pump needle and the plastic pump hose ideal for inflatable toys, Air bed, football, balloons, swim ring, ect.
★Easy to install: This pump adaptor for inflatables is ightweight, practical, convenient to install and easy to use, simply screw and inflate automotive pump, compressor.
★With the set you will receive all the adapters you need for standard valves. As such, you will have a solution at hand for all valve types and no longer need to worry about having the wrong pump.
description: Product Description The bike valve adapter set with the different specifications, allows adjustment of unsuitable valves, can meet different inflatable equipment! The valves are required and practical for different applications, whether for bicycle valves such as slave valve or bike valve, balloons, air mattresses and inflatable buoyancy needs or paddling pools or similar applications. Dunlop, Presta, Schrader Adapter 1 x Presta / Dunlop Valve to Schrader Adapter 1 x Schrader to Dunlop Valve Adapter 1 x Presta Valve Adaptor Inflatable nozzle The inflatable nozzle fits all kinds of inflatable games, air mattresses , paddling pools etc. Ball pump needle The ball pump needle fits all kinds of toys, such as basketball, soccer, volleyball, etc. Look no further for other specifications. Suitable for Dunlop valve (DV), Schrader valve, Flash valve, Presta valve (SV), Presta valve a => Schrader / Automatic valve (AV). Application: DV = Dunlop Valve (English Valve) SV = Presta Valve (French Valve) AV = Schrader Valve (American Valve) Features: The standard size adaptor fits most bike pumps! Help on the road with flat tyres: With the adapters you can inflate your bike at any gas station without any problems. Once you've tried it, you'll probably never pick up a bicycle pump again. All made from high quality materials: Made of copper, metal and plastic, with weight of 17g, which is extremely durable and corrosion resistant. Thanks to the high-quality workmanship, the set will be a long-term companion.
